---
title: "Home"
---

<div class="hero-section">
<div class="container">

<div class="row align-items-center min-vh-100">

<div class="col-lg-6">

<h1 class="hero-title">GAYASHAN WALAWAGE</h1>

<h2 class="hero-role">Senior UI/UX Engineer | Project Coordinator | MBA Candidate</h2>

<p class="hero-description">
Crafting intuitive digital experiences with 5+ years of expertise in UI/UX design and front-end development.
</p>

<div class="hero-stats">

<div class="stat-item">
<div class="stat-number">5+</div>
<div class="stat-label">YEARS EXPERIENCE</div>
</div>

<div class="stat-item">
<div class="stat-number">30+</div>
<div class="stat-label">PROJECTS</div>
</div>

<div class="stat-item">
<div class="stat-number">3</div>
<div class="stat-label">COUNTRIES</div>
</div>

</div>

<div class="hero-buttons">
<a href="projects.qmd" class="btn-primary">View My Work</a>
<a href="contact.qmd" class="btn-outline">Get In Touch</a>
</div>

</div>

<div class="col-lg-6 text-center">

<div class="profile-image-wrapper">
<img src="main.png" alt="Gayashan Walawage" class="profile-image">
</div>

</div>

</div>
</div>
</div>

---

## Featured Projects

<div class="card-grid">

<div class="card">
<img src="AIGrow.png" class="card-image" alt="AI Grow Project">
<h3>AI Grow</h3>
<p>Smart agriculture platform with IoT integration for greenhouse monitoring.</p>
<a href="projects.qmd#ai-grow">View Project →</a>
</div>

<div class="card">
<img src="B&A.png" class="card-image" alt="Bricks+Agent Project">
<h3>Bricks+Agent</h3>
<p>AI-powered property management platform connecting tenants and contractors.</p>
<a href="projects.qmd#bricks-agent">View Project →</a>
</div>

<div class="card">
<img src="Vega.webp" class="card-image" alt="Vega EVX Project">
<h3>Vega EVX</h3>
<p>Electric vehicle platform focused on EV fleet and charging infrastructure.</p>
<a href="projects.qmd#vega-evx">View Project →</a>
</div>

<div class="card">
<img src="JLL.jpg" class="card-image" alt=" JLL Project">
<h3>JLL</h3>
<p>AI-powered insuarance platform connecting tenants and contractors.</p>
<a href="projects.qmd#jll">View Project →</a>
</div>

</div>
